title: Number of Reis
wikitext:
[]: Number of Reis             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Jul 13, 2005 11:53 am right, something that's got to me for a long time: Rei I was the little one we see Naoki kill, right? Rei II is then the one we see at the start of the series, right? this is where it gets fussy. when does Rei II actually die? is it when unit-00 goes up against an angel with only one arm and an N^2 mine, or when she self destructs? if it's the first, then there would be 4 Reis, which is what appears to be the case. i think she dies on the mental one armed attack because she gets her head sliced in half and they everyone makes a big deal about her still being alive when she obviously should be dead. please let me know, it's killing me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 13, 2005 11:59 am So far as we know, ReiII and Eva-00 survived the N2 attack on Zeruel with only minor injury or damage.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jul 13, 2005 12:37 pm Rei II died subsequent of Unit-00's self destruction in episode #23. If you look closely, you can see her lifeless arm in the foreground, inside the entry plug as the recovery team is peering inside.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Jul 13, 2005 2:24 pm In #20 we see Rei wake up in the hospital and observe (with a tinge of disappointment) "I'm still alive..."

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 13, 2005 2:57 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Rei II died subsequent of Unit-00's self destruction in episode #23. If you look closely, you can see her lifeless arm in the foreground, inside the entry plug as the recovery team is peering inside.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Thu Jul 14, 2005 10:00 am i knew she definately died in the selfdestruction scene, but i wasn't sure about the zerual one; she does get her head sliced in half......

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Thu Jul 14, 2005 10:38 am ice reaper wrote: i knew she definately died in the selfdestruction scene, but i wasn't sure about the zerual one; she does get her head sliced in half......

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:15 am Rei contains the sole of lilith, and when the the current Rei dies they can transfer that sole into a new body. Their more to it then this but thats the short version.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:27 am Mr. Bud wrote: ice reaper wrote: i knew she definately died in the selfdestruction scene, but i wasn't sure about the zerual one; she does get her head sliced in half......

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:34 am I think the reason you would think that Rei's head would be sliced off would be because of the batte in EoE with Asuka, but Asuka only recived those injuries cus of the lance of longous which as in biblical mythology (fact not just commentary) can peirce the soul (i looked it up... on GOOGLE!!!!!!) but in Rei's case just the eva would have been hurt not her.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:39 am sadsadshinji wrote: less of a recovery team, more of a clean-up crew

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Thu Jul 14, 2005 12:50 pm TheBlueTree wrote: I think the reason you would think that Rei's head would be sliced off would be because of the batte in EoE with Asuka, but Asuka only recived those injuries cus of the lance of longous which as in biblical mythology (fact not just commentary) can peirce the soul (i looked it up... on GOOGLE!!!!!!) but in Rei's case just the eva would have been hurt not her.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Jul 14, 2005 12:58 pm Mr. Bud wrote: TheBlueTree wrote: I think the reason you would think that Rei's head would be sliced off would be because of the batte in EoE with Asuka, but Asuka only recived those injuries cus of the lance of longous which as in biblical mythology (fact not just commentary) can peirce the soul (i looked it up... on GOOGLE!!!!!!) but in Rei's case just the eva would have been hurt not her.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Fri Jul 15, 2005 5:00 am But that was just Unit-00. Remember that Unit-02 got her arms and head cut off and Asuka was fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 15, 2005 7:11 am ice reaper wrote: yeah, but she has her synch thing turned off.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Fri Jul 15, 2005 9:34 am Reichu wrote: ice reaper wrote: yeah, but she has her synch thing turned off.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Fri Jul 15, 2005 11:50 am my last post was a bit short; i was in a massive rush. i know it was on when the arms went off, but not when the head was lobbed off. we hear Misato (i think) yelling to cut off the synch ratio.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jul 15, 2005 12:02 pm There are like, a bajillion Reis, but only 3 of them had souls. Rei I got choked by Naoko, Rei II went BOOM!, and Rei III merged with Lilith and grew a giant vagina on her forehead.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Jul 15, 2005 1:56 pm Defectron wrote: There are like, a bajillion Reis, but only 3 of them had souls. Rei I got choked by Naoko, Rei II went BOOM!, and Rei III merged with Lilith and grew a giant vagina on her forehead.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Jul 15, 2005 2:32 pm That'd be why Zerogouki kept going crazy-mad-nutso, then. Huh, I'd never heard of that explantion before, and it makes a damnsight more sense than others.
